classifications.label: REAL
classifications.note: Non-admin owners can rotate keys based only on owner identity. The proposed flow has no reauthentication check in this boundary.

classifications.label: GHOST
classifications.note: The audit payload records both actor and target ids.

spec_mutations: Add a reauthentication requirement before owner-initiated key rotation.
decision_rationale: The security boundary has an unmitigated high-severity REAL finding.
